title: Draft plan 03e-packs-other
description: Draft the detailed plan doc for 03e-packs-other using /plan-draft. Covers: frameworks, remote.rsync, secrets.vault, platform.github — remaining packs.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Plan 03e-packs-other and test harness drafted. Plan commit: 14bb8e3, test harness commit: 34f8eb8. 4 packs (frameworks, rsync, vault, github), 12 safe + 22 destructive patterns, 82 golden entries. Ready for /plan-review.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Round 1 review incorporation complete at b65ffee. 31 findings from 2 reviewers: 22 incorporated, 9 not incorporated. Key fixes: vault S2 Not clauses (P0), 7 new destructive patterns, S4b manage.py migrate safe, 95 golden entries total.
